title: Senior Financial Analyst - State Bank of India - Top MNC

jsonLd.title: Senior Financial Analyst - State Bank of India - Top MNC
jsonLd.description:
State Bank of India invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Senior Financial Analyst at our Gwalior location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About State Bank of India:
State Bank of India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Income Tax

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual performance appraisal
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Gwalior, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with State Bank of India!
